allow: Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS WorkCompetitionPlatform CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci; SHOW DATABASES;")

Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS WorkCompetitionPlatform; DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS work_competition_platform; CREATE DATABASE WorkCompetitionPlatform CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci; USE WorkCompetitionPlatform; CREATE TABLE role \(id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, role_name VARCHAR\(50\) NOT NULL, role_code VARCHAR\(50\) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR\(200\)\) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4; INSERT INTO role \(role_name, role_code, description\) VALUES \('管理员', 'ADMIN', '赛事组织者'\); SELECT * FROM role;")

Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS WorkCompetitionPlatform; CREATE DATABASE WorkCompetitionPlatform CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci; USE WorkCompetitionPlatform; CREATE TABLE role \(id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, role_name VARCHAR\(50\) NOT NULL, role_code VARCHAR\(50\) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR\(200\)\) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4; INSERT INTO role \(role_name, role_code, description\) VALUES \('管理员', 'ADMIN', '赛事组织者'\), \('评委', 'JUDGE', '评审专家'\), \('参赛者', 'PARTICIPANT', '参赛学生'\); SELECT * FROM role;")

Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 WorkCompetitionPlatform -e "SELECT id, username, real_name, email, college, major, student_no FROM user LIMIT 10; SELECT '---'; SELECT u.username, r.role_name FROM user u JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id; SELECT '---'; SELECT track_name, track_type, max_team_size, min_team_size FROM competition_track;")

Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -e "SHOW DATABASES LIKE '%competition%'; USE work_competition_platform; SHOW TABLES; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as table_count FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'work_competition_platform';")

Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 work_competition_platform -e "-- 查看用户数据 SELECT id, username, real_name, college, major, student_no FROM user; -- 查看角色分配 SELECT u.username AS '用户名', r.role_name AS '角色' FROM user u JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id; -- 查看赛事 SELECT competition_name, competition_year, status FROM competition; -- 查看赛道 SELECT track_name AS '赛道名称', track_type AS '作品类型', max_team_size AS '最大人数', min_team_size AS '最小人数' FROM competition_track; -- 查看系统配置 SELECT config_key AS '配置项', config_value AS '配置值', description AS '说明' FROM system_config;")

Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 work_competition_platform -e "SELECT u.username, r.role_name FROM user u JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id ORDER BY u.id;")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 work_competition_platform -e "SELECT track_name, track_type, max_team_size, min_team_size FROM competition_track;")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -e "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS workcompetitionplatform; DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS work_competition; SHOW DATABASES LIKE '%competition%';")
Bash("C:\\Program Files\\Apache Software Foundation\\maven\\bin\\mvn" clean compile -DskipTests)
